title: Covering design C(13,6,4) record hunt
statement: Find a covering design C(13,6,4) with fewer than 66 blocks: a set of 6-element subsets of a 13-element set such that every 4-element subset is contained in at least one block. Published bounds: 63 <= C(13,6,4) <= 66. Lab best so far: verified cover with 79 blocks.
rationale: Laptop-local FunSearch-style evolution: claude -p writes construction programs, a deterministic dual-implementation checker verifies every witness exactly. Published bounds 63 <= C <= 66 (checked 2026-07-22).

title: Covering design C(14,6,4) record hunt
statement: Find a covering design C(14,6,4) with fewer than 80 blocks: a set of 6-element subsets of a 14-element set such that every 4-element subset is contained in at least one block. Published bounds: 75 <= C(14,6,4) <= 80.
rationale: Laptop-local FunSearch-style evolution: claude -p writes construction programs, a deterministic dual-implementation checker verifies every witness exactly. Published bounds 75 <= C <= 80 (checked 2026-07-22).
